Third Party Bridge

Meson

Faster, safer, low-cost, zero-slippage BTC ETH and Stablecoin cross-chain swaps.

go to visit

Bool

Bool Network is a Bitcoin Verification layer that turns all blockchains into Bitcoin’s Layer2.

go to visit

Owlto

Owlto Finance is an intent-centric interoperability protocol, "Bridge the World with AI Agent"

go to visit

Mini Bridge

The cheapest and fastest solution for small-amount cross-chain transfers.

go to visit

oooo

oooo is the first modular bitcoin and L2 liquidity cross-rollup bridge protocol.

go to visit

Omni BTC

OmniBTC is a decentralized cross-chain bridge and lending platform.

go to visit

Orbiter

Orbiter Finance is a ZK-tech-based instant omni rollup on Ethereum.

go to visit

xlink

XLink, developed by ALEX Lab—the largest DeFi platform on Bitcoin.

go to visit

Omnity

Omnichain Hub connects any chain BTC, ETH, Appchains, L1/L2/L3.

go to visit
